info.name: AdminSuite API API Documentation
info.description: REST API for AdminSuite — the administrative management system for DepEd Administrative Officers. Covers personnel (employees, leave, service records, trainings), inventory (items, issuances, RIS), attendance (biometric CSV import, DTR), government reports (Form 6, RIS, DV, IAR, PDS), and financial tracking.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: APIs for user authentication using Laravel Sanctum.

request.description: Authenticate user and generate API token.
Revoke the user's current API token.

item.name: Dashboard - Administrative Officer Command Center
item.description: APIs for dashboard metrics including expiring budgets, critical stock levels, and step increment alerts.

query.description: Days to check for expiring budgets.
Days to analyze for usage patterns.
Days to check for due step increments.
Months required for step increment eligibility.

request.description:
Retrieve all dashboard metrics in a single call including expiring budgets,
critical stock items, and employees due for step increment.

query.description: Days to check for expiring budgets. Defaults to 60.

request.description: Retrieve budgets that are expiring within the specified number of days.

query.description: Days to predict stockout. Defaults to 14.
Days to analyze for usage patterns. Defaults to 30.

request.description: Retrieve inventory items predicted to run out based on usage patterns.

item.name: Get only employees due for step increment

query.description: Days to check for due step increments. Defaults to 60.
Months required for step increment eligibility. Defaults to 36.

request.description: Retrieve permanent employees who are due for step increment within the specified period.

response.body:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 8,
      "employee_number": "2021-0045",
      "employee_name": "Maria Juana Santos",
      "position": "Teacher III",
      "current_step": 3,
      "next_step": 4,
      "last_increment_date": "2023-02-15",
      "months_since_last_increment": 36,
      "next_increment_date": "2026-02-15",
      "days_until_due": 9,
      "alert_message": "Maria Juana Santos's Step Increment (Step 3 → 4) is due in 9 days (February 15, 2026). Prepare NOSA (Notice of Salary Adjustment)."
    }
  ]
}

item.name: HR Management - Attendance Records
item.description: APIs for managing daily time records (DTR) including creation, CSV import, and approval workflows.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of attendance records with optional filtering.
Returns aggregated statistics based on filters.

item.name: Get attendance records for specific employee

request.description: Returns statistics for a specific employee and month.
Bulk upload attendance records via CSV file.

item.name: HR Management - Employees
item.description: APIs for managing employee records, including creation, updates, promotions, and leave credit management.

query.description: Filter by status (Active, Inactive, On Leave, Retired, Resigned).
Filter by employment status (Permanent, Temporary, etc.).
Search by name or employee number.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all employees with optional filtering.
Search employees by name.
Retrieve overall employee statistics including counts by status and position.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific employee.
Create a new employee record with optional initial service record.
Update an existing employee's information.
Soft delete an employee record.
Promote an employee to a new position with updated salary grade.

Bulk update leave credits for all active permanent employees.
Increments vacation_leave_credits and sick_leave_credits by 1.25 days each.
This is typically executed at the end of each month.

item.name: HR Management - Leave Requests
item.description: APIs for managing employee leave requests with approval workflow.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of leave requests with optional filtering.
Retrieve all pending leave requests requiring action.
Get leave statistics for a specific employee.
Create a new leave request with automatic leave credit validation.
Immediate supervisor recommends approval of leave request.
Final approval of leave request with automatic leave credit deduction.
Reject a leave request with reason.
Cancel a leave request with automatic leave credit restoration if already approved.

item.name: HR Management - Service Records
item.description: APIs for managing employee service records (201 files).

request.description: Retrieve all service records for a specific employee.
Add a new service record for an employee.

item.name: User Management
item.description:
Admin-only endpoints for managing user accounts.
Only Admin Officer and Super Admin can create/manage users.
